title: lepidium meyenii subsp. marginatum
intro: Lepidium meyenii subsp. marginatum, also known as Peruvian black maca, is a subspecies of Lepidium meyenii, a plant native to the Andean regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Lepidium meyenii subsp. marginatum include improved fertility, energy, and mental clarity, as well as reduced stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Lepidium meyenii subsp. marginatum include capsules, powders, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its potential benefits.
